privileged_info_summary: The task requires finding real nutritional data from the USDA FoodData Central database (fdc.nal.usda.gov). Verified values: raw chicken breast contains 21.2g protein per 100g (metadata range 20.0-25.0g); raw sweet potato contains 20.1g carbohydrates by difference per 100g (metadata range 18.0-22.0g); raw broccoli contains 89.2mg vitamin C total ascorbic acid per 100g (metadata range 80.0-100.0mg). All metadata nutrient ranges are accurate and encompass the actual USDA FoodData Central values. Data source is the real, publicly accessible USDA FoodData Central database, not synthetic.
